title: lotus indicus
intro: Lotus indicus, also known as the Indian lotus, is a tropical plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus and is native to the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lotus indicus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Lotus indicus include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
